data.name: mySQLDS
data.query:
select customerNumber as a_N, productLine, productName,
MIN(buyprice) as price,
MIN ((tmp.quantityordered)*100/(quantityinstock+tmp.quantityordered)) as inventory_booked_perc,
sum(tmp.total_order) as order_volume,
sum(tmp.quantityordered) as order_count from
(SELECT o.ordernumber,
o.orderdate, o.requireddate, o.shippeddate, o.customernumber,
od.productcode, od.quantityordered, od.priceeach, c.creditlimit, pl.productline,
p.productname, p.quantityinstock, p.buyprice, (od.QUANTITYORDERED*od.PRICEEACH) as total_order
FROM orders o
JOIN orderdetails od ON o.ordernumber = od.ordernumber
JOIN customers c ON o.customernumber = c.customernumber
JOIN products p ON od.productcode = p.productcode
JOIN productlines pl ON p.productline = pl.productline) tmp
group by productname, productline, customernumber;
